holdings.infoBox: VGT is an equity ETF with a total of 329 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 16.78%, Apple at 15.26%, Microsoft at 9.87%, Broadcom at 4.49%, and Micron Technology at 4.19%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Information Technology ETF (VGT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies in the US information technology sector. VGT was launched on Jan 26, 2004 and is issued by Vanguard.
